title: Hawaii DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Authoritative — DCS series + BU13 schedule)
description: Narrative research notes for Hawaii DDS pay: administering agency (HI DHS Disability Determination Branch, within DVR), the verified Disability Claims Specialist examiner series — DCS II (3.386, SR-18) and III (3.387, SR-20) with SR assignments from official HI state job postings and annual figures from the official DHRD Bargaining Unit 13 salary schedule (eff 2025-07-01), the working-supervisor DCS IV (3.388, candidate SR-22, unverified), a hiring-range vs schedule-range note, and HGEA Unit 13 (Professional and Scientific) context. Companion to HI/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Hawaii Department of Human Resources Development (DHRD) / HGEA; HI Dept of Human Services (DHS) Disability Determination Branch
source.title: HI DDS salary research notes (Disability Claims Specialist class spec + DHRD BU13 schedule eff 2025-07-01, retrieved 2026-06-02)

update_cadence: biennial HGEA cycle / annual BU13 schedule
notes: Authoritative for DCS II (SR-18) and III (SR-20): SR assignments verified from official HI state job postings and annual min/max from the official DHRD BU13 salary schedule eff 2025-07-01. Working-supervisor DCS IV (3.388) recorded with a candidate SR-22 mapping (unverified). Hiring-range caveat: postings quote a hiring sub-range (e.g. 'Steps C to I'); full range uses the schedule's Step D-M. Corrections: examiner class is Disability Claims Specialist; SR system confirmed. HGEA Unit 13 (Professional and Scientific).
